transcript.text:
I'm really scared
*A very scary person
*Goheung County, Jeollanam-do Province, South Korea.
Hello everyone
I woke up very early and took 5 hours to come here to Goheung
There is a special fish here that Seoul does not have
Let's go try it
I can already see a lot of seafood
That looks very cool It's huge!
The three-banded sweetlip is really delicious right now
He looks stupid
Look at his lips
Very cute
There are so many side-dishes
What is this?
This is the Black Sea Bream

Really? It comes out like this?
Amazing
Abundant
What was this again? Eel
In the Chojang (Sweet & Spicy Chili Pepper Sauce)
It has a lot of bones
But the meat itself is very savory
Conch That's a lot
This is cooked abalone
I'm going to eat it all
It's so tasty
I want butter-grilled abalone
*Three-Banded Sweetlip
Thank you
This is 1 fish
That's a lot of food

It might not look like it's a lot of food
But it's all meat on the bottom
I'll go ahead and dig in I'm very curious
It's very different
Chewier than a Halibut
It has a very chewy texture
It's delicious
I love the texture
And it's very rich in flavor
It's stiffer than a Halibut
This part is very crispy
The level of crispiness is different for all parts of the fish
It's going to taste good with Ssamjang too! (Seasoned Soybean Paste)
I love eating sashimi with Ssamjang
Sashimi goes well with it
The sashimi itself is excellent

The white part is very delicious
The texture is very uncommon
I'll probably get a slap on the back if I ate like this at a company outing
Like this
She said it was going to be 4kgs
I thought it was going to be too little food
But I think it's going to be enough
This
Every part has its own taste
So you are able to taste different textures from 1 fish
The taste and the scent of the fish is very nice
I'm almost finished
But we are not done yet
They said that was for 5-6 servings
It's not a lot of food
That looks very cool

It doesn't look like a fish
We call it a Sole fish
Others call it Tonguefish
It feels like it's semi-dried
I'll give it a try
It's chewy
It's a nice taste
It's chewy
It's very savory
This tastes really good
It's very similar to a Flounder
It's slightly different
It looks really strange
I feel like I can eat the head too
There's a lot of meat here in the head
Where's its mouth?

Almost looks like an alien
The head tastes good
I've been eating the grilled one
I'll try the steamed dish
This one tastes even better It's so soft
I didn't really eat anything since 5AM
Potato!
Yummy
This right here is like an Eel alley way
You can see all the restaurants that specialize in eels
*What? It's Tzuyang
Come here Let's take a picture
Tzuyang Hwaiting! Eel Hwaiting!
The meat quality is top notch
Are there a lot of bones inside? Not much
I will try the seasoned one first

This one comes out cooked
It's evident that it's different from a freshwater eel
It looks more soft
It's different
Freshwater eels are oily
But this one is very light and clean
I feel like I can eat a lot
It's very good
It's not oily at all It has a clean taste
The seasoning is very tasty
I feel like the marinated one will taste better than the salt grilled
Let's try the salted eel
Looks scrumptious
If the seasoned eel didn't really have the true eel taste
Then this one definitely has its true taste
There are 2 types of eels here

This one is the Conger Eel And there's Sharp-Toothed Eel
The Sharp-Toothed Eel is only for the Summer season
It comes out in a Hot Pot or as a sashimi
Conger Eel is commonly known to be grilled
This one doesn't have bones but this part does
This doesn't have that many bones
The more I eat it, it gets more nutty
The salted eel is very savory
I thought the seasoning was going to be like the Braised Pollock
But it's a very tasty eel seasoning
Hidden Picture Puzzle
I didn't even know it was here
1 last piece
How can I explain this seasoning? It's so good
I came to Goheung for the first time
It was very nice to eat the seafood while I can enjoy the view of the ocean

All the seafood here is natural
That's why I was able to have a very fresh and clean seafood experience
Thanks everyone~
If you look from here, you can see the ocean through the trees
It has a lot of cool plants because it's an eco-forest
I will go eat some more since I've been walking around
